Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*
In this file, we show how any displayed adjunction (resp. equivalence) induces an adjunction (resp. equivalence) between the corresponding total categories.
Created by Kobe Wullaert at 06/12/2022.
*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Adjunctions.

New coercion path [adjunction_of_right_adjoint_over_id_data;
                   left_adj_over_id] : right_adjoint_over_id_data >-> disp_functor is ambiguous with existing 
[functor_of_right_adjoint_over_id] : right_adjoint_over_id_data >-> disp_functor.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.

Local Open Scope mor_disp_scope.
Local Open Scope type_scope.
Local Open Scope cat.


Section TotalFunctorCompositeIdentity.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
total_functor (disp_functor_identity D)
⟹ functor_identity (total_category D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
total_functor (disp_functor_identity D)
⟹ functor_identity (total_category D)

    apply nat_trans_id.
  Defined.

  Context {C1 C2 C3 : category}
          {F : functor C1 C2} {G : functor C2 C3}
          {D1 : disp_cat C1} {D2 : disp_cat C2} {D3 : disp_cat C3}
          (FF : disp_functor F D1 D2) (GG : disp_functor G D2 D3).

  
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C2
G: C2 ⟶ C3
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
D3: disp_cat C3
FF: disp_functor F D1 D2
GG: disp_functor G D2 D3
total_functor (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
⟹ total_functor FF ∙ total_functor GG

  
C1, C2, C3: category
F: C1 ⟶ C2
G: C2 ⟶ C3
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
D3: disp_cat C3
FF: disp_functor F D1 D2
GG: disp_functor G D2 D3
total_functor (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
⟹ total_functor FF ∙ total_functor GG

    apply nat_trans_id.
  Defined.

End TotalFunctorCompositeIdentity.

Section TotalAdjunction.

  Context {C1 C2 : category}
          {F : adjunction C1 C2}.

  Let L := left_functor F.
  Let R := right_functor F.
  Let η := adjunit F.
  Let ε := adjcounit F.

  Context {D1 : disp_cat C1} {D2 : disp_cat C2}
          (FF : disp_adjunction F D1 D2).

  Let LL := left_adj_over FF.
  Let RR := right_adj_over FF.
  Let ηη := unit_over FF.
  Let εε := counit_over FF.

  
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
adjunction_data (total_category D1)
  (total_category D2)

  
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
adjunction_data (total_category D1)
  (total_category D2)

    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
total_category D1 ⟶ total_category D2
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
total_category D2 ⟶ total_category D1
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
functor_identity (total_category D1) ⟹ ?F ∙ ?G
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
?G ∙ ?F ⟹ functor_identity (total_category D2)

    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
total_category D1 ⟶ total_category D2
 exact (total_functor LL).
    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
total_category D2 ⟶ total_category D1
 exact (total_functor RR).
    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
functor_identity (total_category D1)
⟹ total_functor LL ∙ total_functor RR
 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2

total_functor (disp_functor_identity D1)
⟹ total_functor LL ∙ total_functor RR

disp_nat_trans ?τ (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)

 exact η.

disp_nat_trans ?τ (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
right_functor F ∙ left_functor F ⟹ functor_identity C2
 exact ε.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
disp_nat_trans ε (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
 exact εε.
  Defined.

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
identity (pr1 x)
· (η (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
?b

F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
?b = ?t2

D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

identity (pr1 x)
· (η (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
?b
 apply id_left. 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
η (pr1 x)
· identity (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))) =
?t2

        apply id_right.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
# (left_functor F) (η (pr1 x))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))

      exact (triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x)).
    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
pr2
  (# (left_functor total_adjunction_data)
     (adjunit total_adjunction_data x)
   · adjcounit total_adjunction_data
       (left_functor total_adjunction_data x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (left_functor total_adjunction_data
           (functor_identity (total_category D1) x)))
     (pr2
        (functor_identity (total_category D2)
           (left_functor total_adjunction_data x))))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x)
   :
   pr1
     (# (left_functor total_adjunction_data)
        (adjunit total_adjunction_data x)
      · adjcounit total_adjunction_data
          (left_functor total_adjunction_data x)) =
   pr1
     (identity (left_functor total_adjunction_data x)))
  (pr2
     (identity (left_functor total_adjunction_data x)))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
♯ LL
  (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; id_disp
                                               (RR
                                                 (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                                 (LL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))))) ;; 
(id_disp
   (LL (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
      (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; (εε
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (pr1 x))
                                      (LL (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                    id_disp
                                      (LL (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF
        (functor_identity C1 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (left_adj_over FF
        (functor_identity C1 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp
     (left_adj_over FF
        (functor_identity C1 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
♯ LL
  (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; id_disp
                                               (RR
                                                 (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                                 (LL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))))) ;; 
(id_disp
   (LL (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
      (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; (εε
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (pr1 x))
                                      (LL (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                    id_disp
                                      (LL (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

F: adjunction C1 C2

C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
♯ LL
  (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; id_disp
                                               (RR
                                                 (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                                 (LL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))))) ;; 
(id_disp
   (LL (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
      (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; (εε
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (pr1 x))
                                      (LL (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                    id_disp
                                      (LL (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a1_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (id_left
     (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
p: a1_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_composite 
        (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF) 
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (id_left
     (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t
♯ LL
  (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                       id_disp
                       (RR 
                       (left_functor F (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))) ;; 
(id_disp
   (LL (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
      (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
 (εε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
  id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a1_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (id_left
     (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t

identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity

                                                 F

                                                 x))
                                               (LL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))) =

  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (id_left
     (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
id_disp (pr2 x) ;; transportb
                     (mor_disp
                        (disp_functor_identity D1
                           (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
                        (disp_functor_composite
                           (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF) (pr1 x)
                           (pr2 x)))
                     (id_right (adjunit F (pr1 x)))
                     (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (id_left
     (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr2 x)
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (adjunit F (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_right (adjunit F (pr1 x)))
     (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (id_left
     (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t

        now rewrite transport_b_b.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
p: a1_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_composite 
        (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF) 
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (id_left
     (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t
♯ LL
  (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; id_disp
                                               (RR
                                                 (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                                 (LL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))))) ;; 
(id_disp
   (LL (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
      (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; (εε
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (pr1 x))
                                      (LL (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                    id_disp
                                      (LL (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
p: a1_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_composite 
        (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF) 
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (id_left
     (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t
♯ LL
  (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; id_disp
                                               (RR
                                                 (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                                 (LL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))))) ;; 
(id_disp
   (LL (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
      (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; (εε
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (pr1 x))
                                      (LL (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                    id_disp
                                      (LL (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)))) =
?b

F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF)

        (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (id_left
     (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @

   maponpaths_2 compose

        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
♯ LL
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left
        (η (pr1 x)
         · identity
             (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; (id_disp
                                        (LL
                                           (right_functor
                                              F
                                              (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))
                                           (RR
                                              (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                              (LL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))) ;; 
                                      (εε
                                         (left_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (LL (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                       id_disp
                                         (LL (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))

                                         (pr2 x)) =

  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F

     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;;

   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;;

        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
♯ LL

      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; (id_disp
                                        (LL
                                           (right_functor
                                              F
                                              (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))
                                           (RR
                                              (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))

                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2

                                         (LL (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x)) ;;

                                         (LL (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x)))) =

  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

  (LL

   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;;

  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))

identity
  (left_functor F

· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))]

p: a2_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp

     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
