  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) a2_t

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_right (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
  (εε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) a2_t

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (LL (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
        (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
           (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (id_left
     (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
           (left_functor F (pr1 x))
           (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
        (disp_functor_identity D2
           (left_functor F (pr1 x))
           (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
     (id_right (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (εε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) a2_t

        now rewrite transport_b_b.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
p: a2_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite 
        (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) a2_t
♯ LL
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left
        (η (pr1 x)
         · identity
             (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; (id_disp
                                        (LL
                                           (right_functor
                                              F
                                              (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))
                                           (RR
                                              (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                              (LL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))) ;; 
                                      (εε
                                         (left_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (LL (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                       id_disp
                                         (LL (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
p: a2_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite 
        (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) a2_t
♯ LL
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left
        (η (pr1 x)
         · identity
             (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; (id_disp
                                        (LL
                                           (right_functor
                                              F
                                              (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))
                                           (RR
                                              (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                              (LL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))) ;; 
                                      (εε
                                         (left_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (LL (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                       id_disp
                                         (LL (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x)))) =
?b
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
p: a2_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite 
        (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) a2_t
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
p: a2_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite 
        (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) a2_t
♯ LL
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left
        (η (pr1 x)
         · identity
             (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; (id_disp
                                        (LL
                                           (right_functor
                                              F
                                              (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))
                                           (RR
                                              (left_functor
                                                 F

                                                 x))

                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))) ;; 
                                      (εε
                                         (left_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (LL (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                       id_disp
                                         (LL (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x)))) =
?b

F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

  (disp_functor_identity D2)

                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =

  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
p: a2_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite 
        (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) a2_t
id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) = ?t2

        exact p.

identity (pr1 x)

   · identity

RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

                     (pr1 FF)

adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
p: a2_goal =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite 
        (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))

♯ LL

           (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left

                                                F

     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))) @
                                        id_right
                                          (ε
                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))))
                                       a2_t =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
# (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
♯ LL
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_composite 
           (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF) 
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left
        (η (pr1 x)
         · identity
             (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; 
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite 
        (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF) 
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) a2_t =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))

                                         FF

                                         (pr2 x)) =

  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF)

                     (pr2 x)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
# (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))

F: adjunction C1 C2

                       (pr1 x))

identity (pr1 x)

   · identity

RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF)

  (left_functor F (pr1 x))

  (LL

   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;;

  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))

     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[

  (left_functor F

        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))

   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))]

· (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))

        now rewrite ! id_right.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF

                                         (pr2 x)) =

  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
♯ LL
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left
        (η (pr1 x)
         · identity
             (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; transportb
                                       (mor_disp
                                          (disp_functor_composite
                                             (pr12 FF)
                                             (pr1 FF)
                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))
                                             (left_adj_over
                                                FF
                                                (pr1 x)
                                                (pr2 x)))
                                          (disp_functor_identity
                                             D2
                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))
                                             (left_adj_over
                                                FF
                                                (pr1 x)
                                                (pr2 x))))
                                       (id_left
                                          (ε
                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))
                                           · identity
                                               (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))) @
                                        id_right
                                          (ε
                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))))
                                       a2_t =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
# (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] LL
                                               (pr1 x)
                                               (pr2 x)
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
♯ LL
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_composite 
           (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF) 
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left
        (η (pr1 x)
         · identity
             (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; 
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite 
        (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF) 
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) a2_t = 
?b
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1

                                      (left_functor

                                         (pr2 x)) =

  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF)

                     (pr2 x)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
# (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] LL
                                               (pr1 x)
                                               (pr2 x)

        exact (transportb _ q  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x)) (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))).

  (identity (pr1 x)

          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity

  (transportb

                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))
                                           · identity
                                               (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))) @
                                        id_right
                                          (ε
                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))))
                                       a2_t =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (functor_identity C1 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (functor_identity C1 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

  (disp_functor_identity D2)

                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))

                                         (pr2 x)) =

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
♯ LL
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left
        (η (pr1 x)
         · identity
             (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; transportb
                                       (mor_disp
                                          (disp_functor_composite
                                             (pr12 FF)
                                             (pr1 FF)
                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))

                                                FF
                                                (pr1 x)
                                                (pr2 x)))

                                                (pr1 x))
                                           · identity

                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))) @
                                        id_right
                                          (ε
                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))))
                                       a2_t =

D2: disp_cat C2

  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

                                         (pr2 x)) =

                    id_disp

                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

                     (pr1 FF)

a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL

        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
♯ LL
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr2 x)
        ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
           (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
     (id_left
        (η (pr1 x)

             (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; transportb
                                       (mor_disp
                                          (pr1 FF
                                             (right_functor

                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))

                                                 x))

                                                 x)

                                                 x))) @

                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))))
                                       a2_t =

  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;;

     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

x: total_category D1

  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))

  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp

        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
♯ LL
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr2 x)
        ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))

     (id_left
        (η (pr1 x)

      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; transportb
                                       (mor_disp
