                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))) @
                                        id_right
                                          (ε
                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))))
                                       a2_t = ?b
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
♯ LL
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr2 x)
        ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
           (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
     (id_left
        (η (pr1 x)
         · identity
             (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; transportb
                                       (mor_disp
                                          (pr1 FF
                                             (right_functor
                                                F
                                                (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))
                                             ((pr12 FF)
                                                (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                                (left_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))))
                                          (left_adj_over
                                             FF
                                             (pr1 x)
                                             (pr2 x)))
                                       (id_left
                                          (ε
                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))
                                           · identity
                                               (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))) @
                                        id_right
                                          (ε
                                             (left_functor
                                                F
                                                (pr1 x))))
                                       a2_t = ?b
 apply mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker. 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (! (id_left
           (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
         id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))))
  (♯ LL
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (pr2 x)
           ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
              (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; a2_t) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

  (disp_functor_identity D2)

                                      (left_functor

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF)

  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))

C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =

  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF)

                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (! (id_left
           (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
         id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))))
  (♯ LL
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (pr2 x)
           ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
              (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; a2_t) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

         
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
# (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))

           
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
# (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))

           apply id_right.
         
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (! (id_left
           (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
         id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))))
  (♯ LL
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (pr2 x)
           ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
              (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; a2_t) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


         
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =

  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
h: maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (! (id_left
           (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
         id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))))
  (♯ LL
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (pr2 x)
           ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
              (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; a2_t) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

         
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF)

                     (pr2 x)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))]

   · identity

  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

  (LL

(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))

  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))

     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F

        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity

F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
h: maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
h: maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (! (id_left
           (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
         id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))))
  (♯ LL
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (pr2 x)
           ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
              (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; a2_t) = ?b

F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
h: maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) = ?y'

           exact h.
         
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
h: maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) (hh @ ! q)
  (♯ LL
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (pr2 x)
           ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
              (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; a2_t) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

         
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
h: maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) (hh @ ! q)
  (♯ LL
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (pr2 x)
           ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
              (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))) a1_t) ;; counit_over FF
                                          (left_functor
                                             F (pr1 x))
                                          (left_adj_over
                                             FF
                                             (pr1 x)
                                             (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

         
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
h: maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) (hh @ ! q)
  (♯ LL
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (pr2 x)
           ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
              (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
        (! (id_left
              (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
            id_right (η (pr1 x)))) a1_t) ;; counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                              (left_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) (! q)
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
h: maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
♯ LL
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr2 x)
        ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
           (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
     (! (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x)))) a1_t) ;; counit_over
                                           FF
                                           (left_functor
                                              F
                                              (pr1 x))
                                           (left_adj_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1 x)
                                              (pr2 x)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! q @ ! (hh @ ! q))
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

         
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))

  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F

· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =

  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
♯ LL
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr2 x)
        ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
           (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
     (! id_right (η (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_left
          (η (pr1 x)
           · identity
               (right_functor F
                  (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) a1_t) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! q @ ! (! q) @ ! hh)
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

                     (pr1 FF)

  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))

     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[

  (left_functor F

        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F

  (! (id_left

        ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))

     (! id_right (η (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_left
          (η (pr1 x)
           · identity
               (right_functor F

counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (idpath
     (# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
      · adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @ ! hh)
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

         
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
h: maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (LL ((pr12 F) (pr1 F (pr1 x)))
        ((pr12 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
           (pr1 FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))
  (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
     (! id_right (η (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_left
          (η (pr1 x)
           · identity
               (right_functor F
                  (left_functor F (pr1 x))))))
  (♯ LL a1_t) ;; counit_over FF
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x))
                   (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) (! hh)
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

   · identity

  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;;

   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;;

  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)

                         (pr2 x))) =

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

  (left_functor F

        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))]

q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)

      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
