     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (! id_right (η (pr1 x)) @
         ! id_left
             (η (pr1 x)
              · identity
                  (right_functor F
                     (left_functor F (pr1 x))))))
     (♯ LL (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; counit_over
                                                FF
                                                (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                                (left_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))) =
♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;;

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

         
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
hh: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
h: maponpaths
  (compose
     (# (left_functor F)
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (! (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
hh @ ! q
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (! hh))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (# (left_functor F) (η (pr1 x)))
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x))))))
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
        (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
           (! id_right (η (pr1 x)) @
            ! id_left
                (η (pr1 x)
                 · identity
                     (right_functor F
                        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (♯ LL (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                               FF
                                               (left_functor
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                               (left_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))) =
♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

         
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))

RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

         apply homset_property.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (functor_identity C1 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D2
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))

                                         FF

                                         (pr2 x)) =

  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

F: adjunction C1 C2

R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

  (disp_functor_identity D2)

                                         F (pr1 x))

                                         FF

                                         (pr2 x)) =

     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))

                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)

  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)

  (identity (pr1 x)

      · identity
          (right_functor F

· (identity

     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) = ?b

F: adjunction C1 C2

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                    id_disp
                      (RR

                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF)

  (LL

        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;;

   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;;

  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))

     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))]

  (identity (pr1 x)

· (identity

   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;;

· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))]

· (identity

· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
♯ (left_adj_over FF) (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) = ?t2

          exact t.

           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
transportf
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) (! q)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (! triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
     (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (maponpaths
        (compose
           (# (left_functor F)
              (identity (pr1 x)
               · (η (pr1 x)
                  · identity
                      (right_functor F
                         (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
        (id_left
           (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
         id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      maponpaths_2 compose
        (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
           (id_left
              (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
            id_right (η (pr1 x))))
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
transportf
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x) @ ! q)
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (maponpaths
        (compose
           (# (left_functor F)
              (identity (pr1 x)
               · (η (pr1 x)
                  · identity
                      (right_functor F
                         (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
        (id_left
           (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
         id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
      maponpaths_2 compose
        (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
           (id_left
              (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
            id_right (η (pr1 x))))
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
t:= triangle_1_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): ♯ (left_adj_over FF)
  (unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                      (left_functor
                                         F (pr1 x))
                                      (left_adj_over
                                         FF
                                         (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
a1_goal:= id_disp (pr2 x) ;; (ηη (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                    id_disp
                      (RR
                       (left_functor F
                       (pr1 x))
                       (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))): pr2 x -->[
identity (pr1 x)
· (adjunit F (pr1 x)
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (pr1 x))))] 
RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a1_t:= unit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): disp_functor_identity D1 (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
adjunit F (pr1 x)] disp_functor_composite
                     (pr1 FF) 
                     (pr12 FF) 
                     (pr1 x) 
                     (pr2 x)
a2_t:= counit_over FF (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) 
  (pr1 FF) (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))] 
disp_functor_identity D2
  (left_functor F (pr1 x))
  (left_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
a2_goal:= id_disp
  (LL
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
        (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; 
(εε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
 id_disp (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))): LL
  (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (RR (left_functor F (pr1 x))
     (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) -->[
identity
  (left_functor F
     (right_functor F
        (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
· (adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))] 
LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
q: # (left_functor F)
  (identity (pr1 x)
   · (η (pr1 x)
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· (identity
     (left_functor F
        (right_functor F (left_functor F (pr1 x))))
   · (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) =
# (left_functor F) (adjunit F (pr1 x))
· adjcounit F (left_functor F (pr1 x))
! triangle_id_left_ad F (pr1 x) @ ! q =
! (maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (left_functor F)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · (η (pr1 x)
               · identity
                   (right_functor F
                      (left_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (id_left
        (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
      id_right (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (maponpaths # (left_functor F)
        (id_left
           (η (pr1 x)
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F (pr1 x)))) @
         id_right (η (pr1 x))))
     (ε (left_functor F (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))

        apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
triangle_2_statement total_adjunction_data

  
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
triangle_2_statement total_adjunction_data

    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
adjunit total_adjunction_data
  (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)
· # (right_functor total_adjunction_data)
    (adjcounit total_adjunction_data x) =
identity (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)

    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
pr1
  (adjunit total_adjunction_data
     (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)
   · # (right_functor total_adjunction_data)
       (adjcounit total_adjunction_data x)) =
pr1 (identity (right_functor total_adjunction_data x))
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
pr2
  (adjunit total_adjunction_data
     (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)
   · # (right_functor total_adjunction_data)
       (adjcounit total_adjunction_data x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (functor_identity (total_category D1)
           (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)))
     (pr2
        (right_functor total_adjunction_data
           (functor_identity (total_category D2) x))))
  ?p
  (pr2
     (identity (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)))

    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
pr1
  (adjunit total_adjunction_data
     (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)
   · # (right_functor total_adjunction_data)
       (adjcounit total_adjunction_data x)) =
pr1 (identity (right_functor total_adjunction_data x))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) = ?b

F: adjunction C1 C2

R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x)) =
identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))

      exact (triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x)).
    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
pr2
  (adjunit total_adjunction_data
     (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)
   · # (right_functor total_adjunction_data)
       (adjcounit total_adjunction_data x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (functor_identity (total_category D1)
           (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)))
     (pr2
        (right_functor total_adjunction_data
           (functor_identity (total_category D2) x))))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x)
   :
   pr1
     (adjunit total_adjunction_data
        (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)
      · # (right_functor total_adjunction_data)
          (adjcounit total_adjunction_data x)) =
   pr1
     (identity (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)))
  (pr2
     (identity (right_functor total_adjunction_data x)))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (id_disp
     (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                                  id_disp (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (id_disp
     (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                                  id_disp (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_identity D1

        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (id_disp
     (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                                  id_disp (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (id_disp
     (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                                  id_disp (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))

     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (id_disp
     (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                                  id_disp (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; 
(εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; id_disp (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

                                              FF)

q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
p: id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                               id_disp (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (id_disp
     (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                                  id_disp (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))

                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

F: adjunction C1 C2

                                                 x)) =

id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; 
(εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; id_disp (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)

                                                 x)) =
transportb

  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))

q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; 
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (id_right (adjcounit F (pr1 x)))
  (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
