ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) (pr2 x))
  (id_left (adjcounit F (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_right (adjcounit F (pr1 x)))
     (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

        now rewrite transport_b_b.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
p: id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                               id_disp (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (id_disp
     (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                                  id_disp (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
p: id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                               id_disp (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (id_disp
     (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                                  id_disp (pr2 x))) =
?b
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
p: id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                               id_disp (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
p: id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                               id_disp (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (id_disp
     (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                                  id_disp (pr2 x))) =
?b

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
p: id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                               id_disp (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; 
(εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; id_disp (pr2 x)) = ?t2

        exact p.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
p: id_disp
  (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (εε (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; 
                               id_disp (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
        (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
  (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) q
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
q:= id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
id_right (ε (pr1 x)): identity ((pr12 F ∙ pr1 F) (pr1 x))
· (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) = ε (pr1 x)
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
      id_right (ε (pr1 x)))
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
      id_right (ε (pr1 x)))
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

                                              FF)

                                              FF

                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
      id_right (ε (pr1 x)))
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity

     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =

F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))

t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))

                                              FF)

                                                 x)) =

  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· identity
    (right_functor F
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
· # (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))

        now rewrite ! id_right.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))

                                              FF)

                                              FF

                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
      id_right (ε (pr1 x)))
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)))] RR (pr1 x)
                                          (pr2 x)

F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))

  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
      id_right (ε (pr1 x)))
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) = ?b
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x) -->[
identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)))] RR (pr1 x)
                                          (pr2 x)

        exact (transportb _ p (transportb (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)) (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))).

  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

  (disp_functor_identity D2)

                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over

                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =

  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) p
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
     (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
   maponpaths_2 compose
     (id_left
        (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

  (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))

  (maponpaths

                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))

         · identity
             (right_functor F

      id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
   triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x) =
maponpaths
  (compose
     (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
      · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
  (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
     (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
      id_right (ε (pr1 x)))) @
maponpaths_2 compose
  (id_left
     (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
   id_right (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
  (# (right_functor F) (ε (pr1 x))) @
triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction F (pr1 x)

        apply homset_property.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF)
           (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
      id_right (ε (pr1 x)))
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) p
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
     (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           ((pr12 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) (pr2 x))
     (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
      id_right (ε (pr1 x)))
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) p
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
     (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2

                                              FF)

                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =

  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           ((pr12 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) (pr2 x))
     (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
      id_right (ε (pr1 x)))
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           ((pr12 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) (pr2 x))
     (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x))))
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (RR (pr1 F ((pr12 F) (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           ((pr12 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
     (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
     (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right (ε (pr1 x)))))
  (♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
transportf
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
            id_right (ε (pr1 x))))))
  (id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                      (right_functor F
                                         (pr1 x))
                                      (RR (pr1 x)
                                         (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                    id_disp
                                      (RR
                                         (left_functor
                                            F
                                            (right_functor
                                               F
                                               (pr1 x)))
                                         (LL
                                            (right_functor
                                               F
                                               (pr1 x))
                                            (RR
                                               (pr1 x)
                                               (pr2 x))))) ;; 
   ♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
     (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
        (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
            id_right (ε (pr1 x))))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)))
     (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! maponpaths
       (compose
          (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
              · identity
                  (right_functor F
                     (left_functor F
                        (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
       (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
          (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
              id_right (ε (pr1 x))))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)))
     (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)) @
   ! maponpaths
       (compose
          (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
              · identity
                  (right_functor F
                     (left_functor F
                        (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
       (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
          (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
              id_right (ε (pr1 x))))))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

                                              FF)

                                                 x)) =
