  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))

              · identity

                        (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))

          (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @

· identity
    (right_functor F
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))

        now rewrite ! id_right.

          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
q: id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor
                                      F (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x)
                                      (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor
                                         F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x))
                                         (RR
                                            (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF
        (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)) @
   ! maponpaths
       (compose
          (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
              · identity
                  (right_functor F
                     (left_functor F
                        (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
       (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
          (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
              id_right (ε (pr1 x))))))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

                                              FF)

                                              FF

                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (RR (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
        (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))
  (id_left
     (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x))))))
  (ηη (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   id_disp
     (RR (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
        (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))) ;; ♯ RR
                                        (counit_over
                                           FF (pr1 x)
                                           (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))

F: adjunction C1 C2

R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)

  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)

                                              FF

                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
transportb
  (mor_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (RR (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
        (LL (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))
  (id_left
     (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x))))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_functor_identity D1
           (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
        (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
           (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
     (id_right (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
     (ηη (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) ;; ♯ RR
                                    (counit_over FF
                                       (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))

F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)

x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))

                                              FF)

                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))

· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
        (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (id_left
     (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
   id_right (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))))
  (ηη (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)

                                              FF)

                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF)
        (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (! (id_left
        (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
  (ηη (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (! qq)
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (RR (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
      · (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))))
     (# (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)))
     (! (id_left
           (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
            · identity
                (right_functor F
                   (left_functor F
                      (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
         id_right
           (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))))))
  (ηη (right_functor F (pr1 x)) (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
   ♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (! qq)
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))

        
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
cancel_postcomposition
  (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
  (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
      · identity
          (right_functor F
             (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x))))))
  (# (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)))
  (! (id_left
        (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
         · identity
             (right_functor F
                (left_functor F
                   (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) @
      id_right (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))))) =
! qq

        apply homset_property.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
q: id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor
                                      F (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x)
                                      (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor
                                         F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x))
                                         (RR
                                            (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF
        (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor F
                                      (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F (pr1 x))
                                         (RR (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)) @
   ! maponpaths
       (compose
          (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
              · identity
                  (right_functor F
                     (left_functor F
                        (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
       (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
          (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
              id_right (ε (pr1 x))))))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))


      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
q: id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor
                                      F (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x)
                                      (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor
                                         F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x))
                                         (RR
                                            (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF
        (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)) @
   ! maponpaths
       (compose
          (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
              · identity
                  (right_functor F
                     (left_functor F
                        (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
       (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
          (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
              id_right (ε (pr1 x))))))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
q: id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor
                                      F (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x)
                                      (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor
                                         F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x))
                                         (RR
                                            (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF
        (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))) =
?b
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
q: id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor
                                      F (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x)
                                      (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor
                                         F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x))
                                         (RR
                                            (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF
        (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)) @
   ! maponpaths
       (compose
          (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
              · identity
                  (right_functor F
                     (left_functor F
                        (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
       (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
          (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
              id_right (ε (pr1 x))))))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
q: id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor
                                      F (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x)
                                      (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor
                                         F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x))
                                         (RR
                                            (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF
        (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))) =
?b

             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =

· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))

                                   (right_functor
                                      F (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x)
                                      (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR

                                         F

                                            F
                                            (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL

  (mor_disp

                                              (counit_over

                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over

                                              (pr2 x)) =
?t2

        exact t.

                                              FF)

                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =

  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))

    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))

· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
q: id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor
                                      F (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x)
                                      (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor
                                         F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x))
                                         (RR
                                            (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF
        (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))

     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (transportb

        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
     (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)) @
   ! maponpaths
       (compose
          (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
              · identity
                  (right_functor F
                     (left_functor F
                        (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
       (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
          (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
              id_right (ε (pr1 x))))))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
t:= triangle_2_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x): unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
  (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                              FF)
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
  (triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x))
  (id_disp (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
p: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F)
    (identity
       (left_functor F (right_functor F (pr1 x)))
     · (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))) =
unit_from_are_adjoints F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F)
    (counit_from_are_adjoints F (pr1 x))
qq: identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· (adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
   · identity
       (right_functor F
          (left_functor F
             (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x)) =
adjunit F (right_functor F (pr1 x))
· # (right_functor F) (adjcounit F (pr1 x))
q: id_disp (RR (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (ηη
                                   (right_functor
                                      F (pr1 x))
                                   (RR (pr1 x)
                                      (pr2 x)) ;; 
                                 id_disp
                                   (RR
                                      (left_functor
                                         F
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x)))
                                      (LL
                                         (right_functor
                                            F
                                            (pr1 x))
                                         (RR
                                            (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x))))) ;; 
♯ RR (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D1
        (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (right_adj_over FF
        (functor_identity C2 (pr1 x))
        (disp_functor_identity D2 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  qq
  (unit_over FF (right_functor F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; ♯ (right_adj_over
                                                 FF)
                                              (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
! (qq @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)) =
! (p @ triangle_id_right_ad F (pr1 x)) @
! maponpaths
    (compose
       (identity (right_functor F (pr1 x))
        · (η (right_functor F (pr1 x))
           · identity
               (right_functor F
                  (left_functor F
                     (right_functor F (pr1 x)))))))
    (maponpaths # (right_functor F)
       (! (id_left (ε (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
           id_right (ε (pr1 x)))))

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
adjunction (total_category D1) (total_category D2)

  
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
adjunction (total_category D1) (total_category D2)

    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
adjunction_data (total_category D1)
  (total_category D2)
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
form_adjunction' ?adjData

    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
adjunction_data (total_category D1)
  (total_category D2)
 exact total_adjunction_data.
    
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
form_adjunction' total_adjunction_data
 
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
triangle_1_statement total_adjunction_data
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
triangle_2_statement total_adjunction_data

      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
triangle_1_statement total_adjunction_data
 apply total_adjunction_triangle1.
      
C1, C2: category
F: adjunction C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: disp_adjunction F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
triangle_2_statement total_adjunction_data
 apply total_adjunction_triangle2.
  Defined.

End TotalAdjunction.

Section TotalEquivalence.

  Context {C1 C2 : category}
          {F : adj_equiv C1 C2}.

  Let L := left_functor F.
  Let R := right_functor F.
  Let η := adjunit F.
  Let ε := adjcounit F.

  Context {D1 : disp_cat C1}
          {D2 : disp_cat C2}
          (FF : equiv_over F D1 D2).

  Let LL := left_adj_over FF.
  Let RR := right_adj_over FF.
  Let ηη := unit_over FF.
  Let εε := counit_over FF.

  
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
∏ x : total_category D1,
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (adjunit (total_adjunction FF) x))

  
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
∏ x : total_category D1,
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (adjunit (total_adjunction FF) x))

    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (adjunit (total_adjunction FF) x))

    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
is_z_isomorphism (pr1 (total_functor_identity D1 x))
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (nat_trans_comp
        (total_functor (disp_functor_identity D1))
        (total_functor
           (disp_functor_composite (left_adj_over FF)
              (right_adj_over FF)))
        (total_functor (left_adj_over FF)
         ∙ total_functor (right_adj_over FF))
        (total_nat_trans (unit_over FF))
        (total_functor_comp_inv (left_adj_over FF)
           (right_adj_over FF)) x))

    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
is_z_isomorphism (pr1 (total_functor_identity D1 x))
 apply Isos.identity_is_z_iso.
    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (nat_trans_comp
        (total_functor (disp_functor_identity D1))
        (total_functor
           (disp_functor_composite (left_adj_over FF)
              (right_adj_over FF)))
        (total_functor (left_adj_over FF)
         ∙ total_functor (right_adj_over FF))
        (total_nat_trans (unit_over FF))
        (total_functor_comp_inv (left_adj_over FF)
           (right_adj_over FF)) x))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (total_nat_trans (unit_over FF) x))
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (total_functor_comp_inv (left_adj_over FF)
        (right_adj_over FF) x))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (total_nat_trans (unit_over FF) x))
 apply (adj_equiv_of_cats_from_adj F).
      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D1
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (total_functor_comp_inv (left_adj_over FF)
        (right_adj_over FF) x))
 apply Isos.identity_is_z_iso.
  Defined.

  
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
∏ x : total_category D1,
RR (F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
identity (R (F (pr1 x)))
· is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr122 F) (pr1 x))
· identity (pr1 x)] pr2 x

  
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
∏ x : total_category D1,
RR (F (pr1 x)) (LL (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) -->[
identity (R (F (pr1 x)))
· is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr122 F) (pr1 x))
· identity (pr1 x)] pr2 x

    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
