           · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x))
                 ⟧,
           p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
           is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (id_right
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
          (id_left
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
   ! (! pr2
          (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
             (id_left
                (identity
                   (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
              id_left
                (identity
                   (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
             (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                 id_left (identity (pr1 x)))))))
  (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (id_disp
                                         (left_adj_over
                                            FF
                                            (right_adjoint
                                               F
                                               (pr1 x))
                                            (right_adj_over
                                               FF
                                               (pr1 x)
                                               (pr2 x))) ;; 
                                       (counit_over FF
                                          (pr1 x)
                                          (pr2 x) ;; 
                                        id_disp
                                          (pr2 x)))) =
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                        (pr11 FF)
                                        (pr1 x)
                                        (pr2 x))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
ff:= pr12 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF)
                                     (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (pr2 x))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x)) (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
id_disp (pr2 x)
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
         · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))))
        (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
         · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
            · identity (pr1 x)))
        (! internal_paths_rew_r
             (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
             (identity (pr1 x)
              · is_z_isomorphism_mor
                  ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
             (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                    pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
              p
              · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
              is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
             (id_right
                (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                   ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
             (id_left
                (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                   ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
      ! (! pr2
             (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                (id_left
                   (identity
                      (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
                 id_left
                   (identity
                      (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
                (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                   ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                   (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                    id_left (identity (pr1 x)))))))
     (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (id_disp
                                            (left_adj_over
                                               FF
                                               (right_adjoint
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                               (right_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))) ;; 
                                          (counit_over
                                             FF
                                             (pr1 x)
                                             (pr2 x) ;; 
                                           id_disp
                                             (pr2 x))))) =
pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF) (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x)

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

                                     (pr11 FF)
                                     (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x) =

  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (pr2 x))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x)) (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
id_disp (pr2 x)
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (! pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
        (identity (pr1 x)
         · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
         · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))))
        (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
         · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
            · identity (pr1 x)))
        (! internal_paths_rew_r
             (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
             (identity (pr1 x)
              · is_z_isomorphism_mor
                  ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
             (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                    pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
              p
              · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
              is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
             (id_right
                (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                   ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
             (id_left
                (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                   ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
      ! (! pr2
             (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                (id_left
                   (identity
                      (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
                 id_left
                   (identity
                      (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
                (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                   ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                   (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                    id_left (identity (pr1 x)))))))
     (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (id_disp
                                            (left_adj_over
                                               FF
                                               (right_adjoint
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                               (right_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))) ;; 
                                          (counit_over
                                             FF
                                             (pr1 x)
                                             (pr2 x) ;; 
                                           id_disp
                                             (pr2 x))))) =
pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF) (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x)

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
ff:= pr12 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF)
                                     (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (pr2 x))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x)) (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
id_disp (pr2 x)
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  ((cancel_postcomposition
      (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
      (identity (pr1 x)
       · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
       · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))))
      (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
       · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
          · identity (pr1 x)))
      (! internal_paths_rew_r
           (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                  pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
            p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
            is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (id_right
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
           (id_left
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
    ! (! pr2
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
               id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                 ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                 (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                  id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))) @
   ! pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (id_disp
                                         (left_adj_over
                                            FF
                                            (right_adjoint
                                               F
                                               (pr1 x))
                                            (right_adj_over
                                               FF
                                               (pr1 x)
                                               (pr2 x))) ;; 
                                       (counit_over FF
                                          (pr1 x)
                                          (pr2 x) ;; 
                                        id_disp
                                          (pr2 x)))) =
pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF) (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x)

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
ff:= pr12 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF)
                                     (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (pr2 x))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x)) (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
id_disp (pr2 x)
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  ((cancel_postcomposition
      (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
      (identity (pr1 x)
       · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
       · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))))
      (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
       · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
          · identity (pr1 x)))
      (! internal_paths_rew_r
           (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                  pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
            p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
            is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (id_right
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
           (id_left
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
    ! (! pr2
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
               id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                 ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                 (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                  id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))) @
   ! pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; (id_disp
                                         (left_adj_over
                                            FF
                                            (right_adjoint
                                               F
                                               (pr1 x))
                                            (right_adj_over
                                               FF
                                               (pr1 x)
                                               (pr2 x))) ;; 
                                       transportb
                                         (mor_disp
                                            (left_adj_over
                                               FF
                                               (right_adjoint
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                               (right_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
                                            (pr2 x))
                                         (id_right
                                            (counit_from_are_adjoints
                                               (pr2 F)
                                               (pr1 x)))
                                         (counit_over
                                            FF (pr1 x)
                                            (pr2 x)))) =
pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF) (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x)

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
ff:= pr12 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF)
                                     (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (pr2 x))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x)) (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
id_disp (pr2 x)
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  ((cancel_postcomposition
      (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
      (identity (pr1 x)
       · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
       · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))))
      (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
       · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
          · identity (pr1 x)))
      (! internal_paths_rew_r
           (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                  pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
            p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
            is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (id_right
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
           (id_left
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
    ! (! pr2
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
               id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                 ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                 (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                  id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))) @
   ! pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; transportb
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (left_adj_over
                                              FF
                                              (right_adjoint
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                              (right_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
                                           (pr2 x))
                                        (id_left
                                           (counit_from_are_adjoints
                                              (pr2 F)
                                              (pr1 x)
                                            · identity
                                                (pr1 x)))
                                        (transportb
                                           (mor_disp
                                              (left_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (right_adjoint
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                                 (right_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
                                              (pr2 x))
                                           (id_right
                                              (counit_from_are_adjoints
                                                 (pr2
                                                 F)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))
                                           (counit_over
                                              FF
                                              (pr1 x)
                                              (pr2 x)))) =
pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF) (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x)

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)

ff:= pr12 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF)
                                     (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (pr2 x))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x)) (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
id_disp (pr2 x)
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  ((cancel_postcomposition
      (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
      (identity (pr1 x)
       · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
       · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))))
      (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
       · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
          · identity (pr1 x)))
      (! internal_paths_rew_r
           (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                  pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
            p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
            is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (id_right
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
           (id_left
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
    ! (! pr2
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
               id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                 ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                 (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                  id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))) @
   ! pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; transportb
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (left_adj_over
                                              FF
                                              (right_adjoint
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                              (right_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
                                           (pr2 x))
                                        (id_left
                                           (counit_from_are_adjoints
                                              (pr2 F)
                                              (pr1 x)
                                            · identity
                                                (pr1 x)) @
                                         id_right
                                           (counit_from_are_adjoints
                                              (pr2 F)
                                              (pr1 x)))
                                        (counit_over
                                           FF (pr1 x)
                                           (pr2 x))) =
pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF) (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x)

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
ff:= pr12 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF)
                                     (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (pr2 x))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x)) (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
id_disp (pr2 x)
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  ((cancel_postcomposition
      (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
      (identity (pr1 x)
       · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
       · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))))
      (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
       · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
          · identity (pr1 x)))
      (! internal_paths_rew_r
           (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                  pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
            p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
            is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (id_right
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
           (id_left
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
    ! (! pr2
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
               id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                 ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                 (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                  id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))) @
   ! pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (left_adj_over
                                              FF
                                              (right_adjoint
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                              (right_adj_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
                                           (pr2 x))
                                        (! (id_left
                                              (counit_from_are_adjoints
                                                 (pr2
                                                 F)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                               · identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)) @
                                            id_right
                                              (counit_from_are_adjoints
                                                 (pr2
                                                 F)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))))
                                        (counit_over
                                           FF (pr1 x)
                                           (pr2 x))) =
pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF) (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x)

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
ff:= pr12 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF)
                                     (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (pr2 x))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x)) (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
id_disp (pr2 x)
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  ((cancel_postcomposition
      (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
      (identity (pr1 x)
       · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
       · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))))
      (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
       · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
          · identity (pr1 x)))
      (! internal_paths_rew_r
           (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                  pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
            p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
            is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (id_right
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
           (id_left
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
    ! (! pr2
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
               id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                 ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                 (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                  id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))) @
   ! pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
        (! (id_left
              (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F)
                 (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
            id_right
              (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F)
                 (pr1 x)))))
     (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                           FF (pr1 x)
                                           (pr2 x))) =
pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF) (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x)

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
ff:= pr12 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF)
                                     (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (pr2 x))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x)) (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
id_disp (pr2 x)
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
     (! (id_left
           (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
            · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right
           (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)))) @
   (cancel_postcomposition
      (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
      (identity (pr1 x)
       · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
       · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))))
      (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
       · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
          · identity (pr1 x)))
      (! internal_paths_rew_r
           (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                  pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
            p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
            is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (id_right
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
           (id_left
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
    ! (! pr2
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
               id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                 ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                 (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                  id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))) @
   ! pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over FF
                                        (pr1 x)
                                        (pr2 x)) =
pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF) (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x)

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
ff:= pr12 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over
                                     (pr11 FF)
                                     (pr1 x)
                                     (pr2 x) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x))
  (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp (pr2 x))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 x)) (pr2 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) =
id_disp (pr2 x)
isaset (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 x ⟧)

      apply homset_property.
    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
pr2 (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) x) ;; transportf
                                             (mor_disp
                                                (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D2
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))
                                                (disp_functor_composite
                                                 (pr121 
                                                 (pr1
                                                 FF))
                                                 (pr111 FF)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)))
                                             (! internal_paths_rew_r
                                                 (C2
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 pr1 x,
                                                 (pr12 
                                                 (pr12 F)
                                                 ∙ 
                                                 pr1
                                                 (pr12 F))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x) ⟧)
                                                 (identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 · 
                                                 is_z_isomorphism_mor
                                                 ((pr222 F)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))
                                                 (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                                                 ((pr222 F)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))
                                                 (λ 
                                                 p : 
                                                 C2
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 pr1 x,
                                                 (pr12 
                                                 (pr12 F)
                                                 ∙ 
                                                 pr1
                                                 (pr12 F))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x) ⟧,
                                                 p
                                                 · 
                                                 identity
                                                 (F
                                                 (right_adjoint
                                                 F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))) =
                                                 is_z_isomorphism_mor
                                                 ((pr222 F)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))
                                                 (id_right
                                                 (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                                                 ((pr222 F)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))))
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                                                 ((pr222 F)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)))))
                                             (pr1
                                                ((pr22 FF)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        ((pr12 (total_adjunction FF)
          ∙ pr1 (total_adjunction FF)) x))
     (pr2
        ((pr12 (total_adjunction FF)
          ∙ pr1 (total_adjunction FF)) x)))
  (pr1
     (pr1 (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) x),,
      is_z_isomorphism_comp
        (identity_is_z_iso
           (pr1
              ((total_functor (right_adj_over FF)
                ∙ total_functor (left_adj_over FF)) x)))
        (is_z_isomorphism_comp ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
           (identity_is_z_iso
              (pr1
                 (functor_identity (total_category D2)
                    x))))))
  (id_disp
     (pr2
        ((pr12 (total_adjunction FF)
          ∙ pr1 (total_adjunction FF)) x)))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
id_disp
  (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (counit_over
                                                FF
                                                (pr1 x)
                                                (pr2 x) ;; 
                                              id_disp
                                                (pr2 x)) ;; 
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 x)
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (! internal_paths_rew_r
       (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
       (identity (pr1 x)
        · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
       (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
        p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
        is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
       (id_right
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
       (id_left
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))))
  (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (pr1
     (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
        (id_left
           (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
         id_left
           (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
        (is_inverse_in_precat_comp ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
           (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
            id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))
  (id_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (! pr1
       (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
          (id_left
             (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
           id_left
             (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
          (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
             ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
             (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
              id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))
  (id_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x) ;; 
                                                 id_disp
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (pr2 x)
        ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
           ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
     (! internal_paths_rew_r
          (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
          (identity (pr1 x)
           · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x))
                 ⟧,
           p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
           is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (id_right
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
          (id_left
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))))
     (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) =
id_disp
  (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (! (! pr1
          (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
             (id_left
                (identity
                   (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
              id_left
                (identity
                   (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
             (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                 id_left (identity (pr1 x)))))))
  (id_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x) ;; 
                                                 id_disp
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (pr2 x)
        ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
           ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
     (! internal_paths_rew_r
          (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
          (identity (pr1 x)
           · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x))
                 ⟧,
           p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
           is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (id_right
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
          (id_left
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))))
     (pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) =
id_disp
  (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (! (! pr1
          (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
             (id_left
                (identity
                   (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
              id_left
                (identity
                   (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
             (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                 id_left (identity (pr1 x)))))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
           (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
        ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
           ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
            · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F)
                 (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))))
        (! internal_paths_rew_r
             (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
             (identity (pr1 x)
              · is_z_isomorphism_mor
                  ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
             (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                    pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
              p
              · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
              is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
             (id_right
                (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                   ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
             (id_left
                (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                   ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))))
     (id_disp
        (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
           (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; 
      (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; id_disp
                                           (pr2 x)) ;; 
      pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))) =
id_disp
  (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
         · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
            · identity (pr1 x))))
     (! internal_paths_rew_r
          (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
          (identity (pr1 x)
           · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x))
                 ⟧,
           p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
           is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
          (id_right
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
          (id_left
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
   ! (! pr1
          (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
             (id_left
                (identity
                   (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
              id_left
                (identity
                   (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
             (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                 id_left (identity (pr1 x)))))))
  (id_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) ;; (counit_over
                                                 FF
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x) ;; 
                                                 id_disp
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x)) ;; 
   pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
id_disp
  (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
     (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))

  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))

F: adj_equiv C1 C2

D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))

                                              (pr1
                                                 x)

                                                 x)) =

     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))

        (compose

            · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F)
                 (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x))))
        (! internal_paths_rew_r
             (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
             (identity (pr1 x)
              · is_z_isomorphism_mor
                  ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
             (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))

                                           (pr2 x)) ;;

counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1
                                           ((pr22 FF)

C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))

  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  ((maponpaths
      (compose
         (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
          · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
             · identity (pr1 x))))
      (! internal_paths_rew_r
           (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                  pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
            p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
            is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (id_right
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
           (id_left
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
    ! (! pr1
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
               id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                 ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                 (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                  id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))) @
   ! pr1 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
           (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
        (pr2 x))
     (! (id_left
           (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
            · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right
           (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x))))
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) ;; pr1
                                           ((pr22 FF)
                                              (pr1 x)
                                              (pr2 x))) =
counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1
                                           ((pr22 FF)
                                              (pr1 x)
                                              (pr2 x))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
ff:= pr22 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1
                                           ((pr22 FF)
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (pr1 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf
(mor_disp
((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)) ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)) ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
(pr1 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
id_disp
((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)) ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  ((maponpaths
      (compose
         (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
          · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
             · identity (pr1 x))))
      (! internal_paths_rew_r
           (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                  pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
            p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
            is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (id_right
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
           (id_left
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
    ! (! pr1
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
               id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                 ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                 (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                  id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))) @
   ! pr1 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
           (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
        ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
           ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x))
        (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
         · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
            · identity (pr1 x)))
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
        (! (id_left
              (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F)
                 (pr1 x) · identity (pr1 x)) @
            id_right
              (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F)
                 (pr1 x)))))
     (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1
                                          ((pr22 FF)
                                             (pr1 x)
                                             (pr2 x)))) =
counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1
                                           ((pr22 FF)
                                              (pr1 x)
                                              (pr2 x))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
ff:= pr22 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1
                                           ((pr22 FF)
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (pr1 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf
(mor_disp
((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)) ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)) ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
(pr1 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
id_disp
((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)) ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (left_adj_over FF (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        (right_adj_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x))
     (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
      · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
         · identity (pr1 x)))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
     (! (id_left
           (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
            · identity (pr1 x)) @
         id_right
           (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)))) @
   (maponpaths
      (compose
         (identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))
          · (counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 F) (pr1 x)
             · identity (pr1 x))))
      (! internal_paths_rew_r
           (C2 ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧)
           (identity (pr1 x)
            · is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (λ p : C2 ⟦ pr1 x,
                  pr1 F ((pr112 F) (pr1 x)) ⟧,
            p · identity (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))) =
            is_z_isomorphism_mor ((pr222 F) (pr1 x)))
           (id_right
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))
           (id_left
              (is_z_isomorphism_mor
                 ((pr222 F) (pr1 x))))) @
    ! (! pr1
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))),,
               id_left
                 (identity
                    (F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
                 ((pr22 F) (pr1 x))
                 (id_left (identity (pr1 x)),,
                  id_left (identity (pr1 x))))))) @
   ! pr1 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (counit_over FF (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1
                                       ((pr22 FF)
                                          (pr1 x)
                                          (pr2 x))) =
counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1
                                           ((pr22 FF)
                                              (pr1 x)
                                              (pr2 x))

      
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
ff:= pr22 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)): counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1
                                           ((pr22 FF)
                                              (pr1
                                                 x)
                                              (pr2
                                                 x)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
  (pr1 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
  (id_disp
     ((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x))
        ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
fff:= transportf_transpose_left ff: transportf
(mor_disp
((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)) ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)) ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
(pr1 (adjcounitiso F (pr1 x)))
(counit_over (pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; pr1 ((pr22 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
id_disp
((pr111 FF) (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)) ((pr121 (pr1 FF)) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
isaset
  (C2 ⟦ F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)),
   F (right_adjoint F (pr1 x)) ⟧)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
∏ b : total_category D2,
is_z_isomorphism (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) b)

  
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
∏ b : total_category D2,
is_z_isomorphism (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) b)

    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2

  (disp_functor_identity D2)

is_z_isomorphism (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) x)

    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) x))
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
is_z_iso_disp
  (pr1 (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) x),, ?i)
  (pr2 (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) x))

    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) x))
 exact (total_adjunction_forms_equivalence2_base x).
    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
is_z_iso_disp
  (pr1 (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) x),,
   total_adjunction_forms_equivalence2_base x)
  (pr2 (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) x))
 
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
x: total_category D2
is_disp_inverse
  (pr1 (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) x),,
   total_adjunction_forms_equivalence2_base x)
  (pr2 (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) x))
  (total_adjunction_forms_equivalence2_disp_inv x)

      exact (total_adjunction_forms_equivalence2_disp_inv_is_inv x).
  Defined.

  
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
