D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
forms_equivalence (total_adjunction FF)

  
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
forms_equivalence (total_adjunction FF)

    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
∏ a : total_category D1,
is_z_isomorphism (adjunit (total_adjunction FF) a)
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2
D1: disp_cat C1
D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
∏ b : total_category D2,
is_z_isomorphism (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) b)

    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2
FF: equiv_over F D1 D2
LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
∏ a : total_category D1,
is_z_isomorphism (adjunit (total_adjunction FF) a)
 exact total_adjunction_forms_equivalence1.
    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

LL:= left_adj_over FF: disp_functor (left_functor F) D1 D2
RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1
ηη:= unit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
∏ b : total_category D2,
is_z_isomorphism (adjcounit (total_adjunction FF) b)
 exact total_adjunction_forms_equivalence2.
  Defined.

  
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
adj_equivalence_of_cats (total_functor LL)

  
C1, C2: category

adj_equivalence_of_cats (total_functor LL)

    
C1, C2: category

forms_equivalence (total_adjunction FF)

    exact total_adjunction_forms_equivalence.
  Defined.

  
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

D2: disp_cat C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
adj_equiv (total_category D1) (total_category D2)

  
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2

ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))

  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
adj_equiv (total_category D1) (total_category D2)

    
C1, C2: category
F: adj_equiv C1 C2
L:= left_functor F: C1 ⟶ C2
R:= right_functor F: C2 ⟶ C1
η:= adjunit F: functor_identity C1 ⟹ pr1 F ∙ pr12 F
ε:= adjcounit F: pr12 F ∙ pr1 F ⟹ functor_identity C2

RR:= right_adj_over FF: disp_functor (right_functor F) D2 D1

  (disp_functor_identity D1)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr1 FF) (pr12 FF))
εε:= counit_over FF: disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite (pr12 FF) (pr1 FF))
  (disp_functor_identity D2)
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (left_functor (total_adjunction FF))

    exact total_adj_equivalence_of_cats.
  Defined.

End TotalEquivalence.
